name: box
description: Box — a self-hosted mobile web app that runs real Claude Code (and Codex) sessions on your own server, from your phone. Native chat UI, voice, files, skills, always-on.

scripts.test: node lib/linear-lite/test.mjs && node server/codex-context.test.mjs && node server/codex-exec-engine.test.mjs && node server/mac-exec-engine.test.mjs && node server/meeting-context.test.mjs && node server/slack-context.test.mjs && node server/voice-assistant.test.mjs
